texto: Rape culture is a concept of unknown origin and of uncertain definition
autor: yet it has made its way into everyday vocabulary and is assumed to be commonly understood. The award-winning documentary film Rape Culture made by Margaret Lazarus in 1975 takes credit for first defining the concept
